name: How long to file lawsuit after work injury involving third party in Draper?

mainEntity.name: How long to file lawsuit after work injury involving third party in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.text: 4 years in Utah for third-party suits[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Utah 4-year statute for personal injury; notify government entities sooner.** Workers comp doesn't toll this[1]. **Key factors:** Identify third-party negligence early; comp lien on recovery. **Practical guidance:** Report comp first, then sue separately for extras like pain. Track deadlines. **Dual claims maximize recovery.**

description: 4 years in Utah for third-party suits[1].
